description: Roleplay prompt: Girl Taking Selfie with Avatar Characters in Cinema
template: Create an 8k resolution image of a 20-year-old girl sitting in a cinema hall. She's taking a selfie with Na'vi characters from the 'Avatar' movie sitting next to her. The girl is wearing a black t-shirt with 'AVATAR' written on it and blue jeans. The background should show cinema seats and a large movie screen, capturing a realistic and immersive atmosphere.
